game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **2112TD：タワーディフェンス　サバイバル**: Players defend their mobile command center against relentless waves of alien creatures by strategically deploying and upgrading various defensive towers, including machine guns, flamethrowers, cannons, and plasma towers, on a fixed path map. Each tower type has unique attack patterns and can be upgraded through multiple tiers to unlock enhanced firepower and special charge attacks, which are activated by tapping the tower icon. As the campaign progresses, players unlock and manage powerful active abilities like air strikes, defensive walls, and tactical drones, which are crucial for overcoming increasingly numerous and resilient enemy hordes. Difficulty scales across Normal, Hard, Nightmare, and Survival modes, with new tower types and abilities unlocked via a research system as players complete missions, and the game ends if any enemy unit reaches and destroys the command center.
game_info.description: Defend your mobile command center against waves of alien invaders in this tower defense survival game. Deploy and upgrade towers (Machine Gun, Flamethrower, Cannon, Plasma) along a fixed path to destroy enemies before they reach your base. Each tower can be upgraded twice for enhanced power. Manage resources wisely and survive multiple waves to win. If any enemy reaches your command center, the game is over.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate/Select towers and positions
Space: Place selected tower / Upgrade selected tower / Confirm action
Z: Cancel selection / Deselect tower
Shift: Speed up game (2x speed when held)
Enter: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and tower placement testing. Validates that the tower selection system works correctly, towers can be placed on valid positions, and basic game mechanics function properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Cycle through available tower types, attempt to place towers at strategic positions along the path. Test tower upgrades when resources allow. Verify that invalid placements are rejected.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully place at least 3 towers at different positions. Upgrade at least one tower. Game runs without errors for at least 30 seconds. Position validation works correctly.

TEST_1.expected: Successfully place at least 3 towers at different positions. Upgrade at least one tower. Game runs without errors for at least 30 seconds. Position validation works correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition testing using optimal tower placement strategy. Tests if the game can be won by deploying towers strategically to defeat all waves of enemies.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Deploy machine guns and cannons at key choke points early. Prioritize upgrading towers to level 2 when resources allow. Place plasma towers for high-value targets. Focus firepower at path segments where enemies are most vulnerable.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully defend against all enemy waves (10 waves). Command center health remains above 0. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Final score reflects efficient defense.
